content: 1) Do LTAs and HBM change the cyclicality of the memory, or at least push the cycle peak back?
2) How much will MU and memory stocks continue to move relative to market risk, given its historical beta?
3) Given the dispersion of stock, what are the likely catalysts in both directions, and why did we see a sell off of 30% and is this a warning sign or an opportunity?

May-JunQ3 DRAM contract pricing roundCRITICALSamsung Securities: 'pace of price increases begins to moderate from Q3 - early signs could trigger share price correction May-June.'
May-JunMicrosoft / Google LTA signing statusCRITICALMinimum price floor terms confirmed or diluted? 3-year deal signed vs 1-year floating? This is the #1 structural bull validator.
Mid-JunHyperscaler Q2 earnings (MSFT, GOOGL, AMZN, META)HIGHAI capex guidance for H2 2026 - Samsung Securities' 'real peak signal.' Not spot prices.
Jul 1Micron Q3 FY2026 earningsCRITICAL$33.5B guided, ~81% GM. Does the number land? Any FY27 visibility change? HBM4E qualification language.
Late 2026HBM4E qualification statusHIGHMicron internal base die vs TSMC base die (SK Hynix/Samsung). The generational moat reset.
